column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with elite consistency atop the Giants’ order, riding a strong recent stretch and a favorable platoon matchup at home against Kevin Gausman. Yordan Alvarez offers similar reliability, coming in hot and benefiting from a park boost in Washington with his own platoon edge. Bobby Witt Jr. and Juan Soto also profile as steady options, but Arraez’s combination of contact skills and matchup makes him the most dependable pick for Beat The Streak lineups tonight.
